content.json:
## Modernization Atlas: Operational Health Dashboard

Real-time visibility into Identity, Management, and Enforcement sync status.

**Last Updated:** Auto-refreshes every 15 minutes.

content.query:
GitHubRepoLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where workflow_name_s has "Atlas"
| summarize count() by status_s
| render piechart
content.title: Orchestrator Sync Status (Last 24h)

content.query:
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where OperationName in ("Disable user", "Enable user")
| extend TargetUser = tostring(TargetResources[0].userPrincipalName)
| summarize count() by OperationName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| render timechart
content.title: Identity Lifecycle Events (7-Day Trend)

content.query:
IntuneDevices
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| summarize count() by ComplianceState
| render barchart
content.title: Device Compliance Overview

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where AlertName has "Atlas"
| project TimeGenerated, AlertName, AlertSeverity, Status
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Atlas Security Alerts (Last 24h)

content.query:
GitHubRepoLogs_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where workflow_name_s has "Atlas"
| summarize SuccessCount=countif(status_s == "success"), FailCount=countif(status_s == "failure") by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| render timechart
content.title: Orchestrator Run History (7-Day)
